inspectables.name: Terminal
text:
SYSTEM STATUS:
Botanical Sector: Operational.
All environmental systems functioning within normal parameters.

inspectables.name: Terminal
text:
WARNING:
Fire detected in Botanical Sector.
Emergency protocol is active.

inspectables.name: Terminal Log
text:
WARNING:
Component overheat.
Replace components immediately.

inspectables.name: Wall Plaque
text:
"And again,
as swarms of bees do not gather for the sake of making honeycomb
but make the honeycomb because they are gregarious by nature,
so human beings—and to a much higher degree—exercise their skill together in action
and thought because they are naturally gregarious."

"And so,
if that virtue which centres in the safeguarding of human interests,
that is, in the maintenance of human society, were not to accompany the pursuit of knowledge,
that knowledge would seem isolated and barren of results."

"In the same way,
courage, if unrestrained by the uniting bonds of society,
would be but a sort of brutality and savagery."

inspectables.name: Card Reader
text: Keycard goes here to access the elevator.

inspectables.name: Protective Suit
text: A protective suit hangs on the wall.

inspectables.name: Keycard
text: You need this to get trough the locked doors.

inspectables.name: Oxygen Bottle
text: The side of the bottle says 'O2 - oxygenium'.

inspectables.name: An Apple
text: This has been harvested just recently. Looks delicious...
